entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 42
entries.excerpt: When the famine seized also the house of Jacob, Jacob said to his sons: “Fear not; behold, I have heard that there is corn in Egypt; get you down thither, and buy… that we may live, and not die” (Gen 42:2). Jacob’s saying, “Fear not,” shows that his sons were indeed greatly afraid. The words, “I have heard that there is corn in Egypt,” show that in all the land they had no bread. And the words, “buy for us… that we may live, and not die,” bear witness to the need which Jacob’s sons suffered from the famine along with all the land of Canaan.…
